\tzpentry{ID3767}{Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3767 introduces Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\\n\\\\Delta P = P_{\\\\text{rear}} - P_{\\\\text{front}}, \\\\quad \\\\text{with} \\\\quad P_{\\\\text{electro}} = \\\\frac{1}{2}\\\\varepsilon_0 E^2\\n\\\\]
